===Pokémon Journeys===
[[File:Chloe JNM.png|thumb|180px|Chloe in {{ma|Pokémon Journeys}}]]
Chloe debuted in ''[[JNM01|Legend? Check! Friends? Check!]]''. She hoped to meet [[Goh]] at the unveiling of the Cerise Laboratory, but he did not show up. Instead, she encountered {{Ash}}, but his enthusiasm at seeing {{TP|Professor Cerise|Yamper}} scared her off. Later, she watched as [[Professor Cerise]] asked Ash and Goh to become his research assistants.
